title: May 18, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic acquires Stainless
summary: Announcements Anthropic acquires Stainless May 18, 2026 The frontier of AI is shifting from models that answer to agents that act—and agents are only as capable as the systems they can reach. Today, Anthropic is acquiring Stainless, a leader in SDKs and MCP server tooling, to extend that reach even further. Founded in 2022, Stainless has powered the generation of every official Anthropic SDK since the earliest days of our API. Hundreds of companies rely on Stainless to generate SDKs, CLIs, and MCP servers—the libraries, command-line tools, and connectors that let developers and agents use an API. Stainless turns an API spec into SDKs across TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Kotlin, and more. Each one is fast, reliable, and built to feel native in its language. “Stainless has shaped how developers experience the Claude API since the start, and it’s been great to work with them on that,” said Katelyn Lesse, Head of Platform Engineering at Anthropic. “Agents are only as useful as what they can connect to. We’re excited to bring the Stainless team into Anthropic to advance Claude’s ability to connect to data and tools.” “I started Stainless because SDKs deserve as much care as the APIs they wrap. Anthropic was one of the first teams to bet on this with us,” said Alex Rattray, Founder and CEO of Stainless. “We have been watching what developers have built on Claude over the last few years, which made bringing our teams together an easy decision. The team gets to keep doing the work we love, on the platform where it matters most.” Anthropic created MCP to make agent connectivity possible. By bringing together the Stainless and Anthropic teams, the Claude Platform continues to push the frontier of developer experience and agent connectivity. Related content KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance KPMG and Anthropic announce a global alliance, with Claude integrated into KPMG's Digital Gateway platform and availab
title_es: Anthropic adquiere Stainless para potenciar agentes IA
bajada: Anthropic compró Stainless, líder en generación de SDKs y servidores MCP, para mejorar la capacidad de sus agentes de conectarse con sistemas externos. La adquisición refuerza la estrategia de Anthropic de pasar de modelos que responden a agentes que actúan, permitiendo que Claude acceda a más datos y herramientas.
bajada_en: Anthropic acquired Stainless, a leader in SDK generation and MCP server tooling, to enhance its agents' ability to connect with external systems. The acquisition strengthens Anthropic's shift from response models to acting agents, enabling Claude to access more data and tools.

title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
title_es: OpenAI y Dell integran IA generativa en empresas
bajada: OpenAI se asoció con Dell para llevar modelos de codificación IA a entornos empresariales híbridos y locales. La alianza permite que empresas desplieguen agentes de IA de forma segura en sus propios sistemas, sin depender de infraestructura en la nube.
bajada_en: OpenAI partnered with Dell to bring AI coding models to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments. The alliance enables companies to securely deploy AI agents within their own systems, without relying on cloud infrastructure.

title: Vera Arrives: NVIDIA’s First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs
summary: The first NVIDIA Vera CPUs arrived at three of the world's leading AI labs on Friday — Anthropic in San Francisco, OpenAI in Mission Bay, SpaceXAI in Palo Alto — followed by a delivery to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in Santa Clara on Monday. NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.
title_es: NVIDIA entrega Vera, su primer CPU diseñado para agentes IA
bajada: NVIDIA comenzó a entregar los primeros chips Vera, CPUs diseñadas específicamente para ejecutar agentes de IA, a laboratorios líderes como Anthropic, OpenAI y SpaceX. Vera promete ejecutar inferencia de agentes con mejor eficiencia que CPUs tradicionales.
bajada_en: NVIDIA began delivering Vera, its first CPU specifically designed for AI agents, to leading labs including Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Vera promises to run agent inference more efficiently than traditional CPUs.

title: May 19, 2026AnnouncementsKPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
summary: Announcements KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance May 19, 2026 KPMG—one of the world's largest professional services firms for audit, tax, legal, and advisory services across 138 countries and territories—has announced a global alliance with Anthropic to bring Claude into the heart of its business. As part of this alliance, KPMG is embedding Claude inside Digital Gateway, the software KPMG's people and clients use to do the actual work—starting with new tools for tax and legal clients. And every one of KPMG's 276,000+ employees globally will gain access to Claude. Anthropic is also naming KPMG a preferred partner for private equity, and the two companies will build new Claude-powered products together for PE portfolio companies. KPMG and Claude KPMG helps organizations in various industries work together to transform, innovate, and effectively compete in tomorrow’s fast-changing world. Integrating AI across its core business furthers this mission—and requires trust and diligence. “At KPMG, we’re innovating and redefining how work gets done,” said Bill Thomas, Global Chairman and CEO, KPMG International. “This global alliance with Anthropic reflects our shared commitment to responsible AI, prioritizing security, trust, and governance as KPMG firms scale these capabilities to our clients and people around the world.” “KPMG works in industries where accuracy, accountability, and trust aren’t optional, and they're applying the same standard to AI. They’re rolling Claude out to 276,000 people across the business, and using it for client work in tax and private equity. They're also bringing it into cybersecurity, where it helps find and fix vulnerabilities. That's what a firm-wide commitment to AI looks like, and we're proud to be the partner they chose,” said Daniela Amodei, Co-founder and President of Anthropic. Claude for 276,000+ KPMG people Beyond the client-facing platform, every KPMG employee—all
title_es: KPMG integra Claude en toda su operación global
bajada: KPMG, la firma de servicios profesionales con 276,000 empleados, anunció una alianza estratégica con Anthropic para integrar Claude en Digital Gateway, su plataforma central de trabajo. Todos los empleados de KPMG tendrán acceso a Claude para tareas de auditoría, impuestos y legal.
bajada_en: KPMG, the professional services firm with 276,000 employees, announced a strategic alliance with Anthropic to integrate Claude into Digital Gateway, its central work platform. All KPMG employees will have access to Claude for audit, tax, and legal tasks.

title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
summary: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.
title_es: SandboxAQ democratiza descubrimiento de fármacos con Claude
bajada: SandboxAQ integró sus modelos de descubrimiento de fármacos con Claude para hacerlos accesibles a usuarios sin expertise en computación. La compañía apuesta por que el acceso, no solo la calidad del modelo, es el principal obstáculo en IA aplicada a ciencias.
bajada_en: SandboxAQ integrated its drug discovery models with Claude to make them accessible to users without computing expertise. The company believes access, not just model quality, is the main barrier in AI applied to sciences.

title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
title_es: IBM y Hugging Face lanzan Open Agent Leaderboard
bajada: Se lanzó el Open Agent Leaderboard, un benchmark abierto para evaluar el desempeño de sistemas multi-agente. La herramienta permite que developers comparen implementaciones de agentes y compartan mejores prácticas.
bajada_en: The Open Agent Leaderboard was launched, an open benchmark for evaluating multi-agent system performance. The tool allows developers to compare agent implementations and share best practices.

title: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at Dell Technologies World: ‘Demand Is Going Parabolic, Utterly Parabolic’
summary: Agentic AI inference at one-tenth the cost per token with NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72. Agent sandboxes run 50% faster on NVIDIA Vera than traditional CPUs — while enterprise data queries are up to 3x faster with the Vera CPU. And 5,000 enterprises like Lilly, Samsung and Honeywell are running AI workloads on Dell AI Factories […]
title_es: NVIDIA Vera reduce costos de inferencia agentic en empresas
bajada: NVIDIA presentó resultados de Vera Rubin NVL72 mostrando inferencia agentic a un décimo del costo de tokens tradicionales. El chip ejecuta agent sandboxes 50% más rápido y acelera queries empresariales hasta 3x, con 5,000 empresas ya usando Dell AI Factories.
bajada_en: NVIDIA presented Vera Rubin NVL72 results showing agentic inference at one-tenth the cost of traditional tokens. The chip runs agent sandboxes 50% faster and accelerates enterprise queries up to 3x, with 5,000 companies already using Dell AI Factories.

title: bytedance released an open source model that attempts to do just about anything with only 3b parameters
summary: EDIT: working linkhttps://huggingface.co/bytedance-research/LanceLance is a lightweight native unified multimodal model that supportsimage and video understanding, generation, and editingwithin a single framework.Efficient at 3B scale.With only3B active parameters, Lance delivers strong performance across image generation, image editing, and video generation benchmarks.Trained from scratch.Lance is built with a staged multi-task recipe and trained entirely from scratch within a128-A100-GPUbudget.submitted by/u/uxl[link][comments]
title_es: ByteDance libera Lance, modelo multimodal de 3B eficiente
bajada: ByteDance lanzó Lance, un modelo open-source multimodal de solo 3 mil millones de parámetros que maneja generación de imágenes, videos y edición. Entrenado desde cero con presupuesto limitado, Lance demuestra que la eficiencia extrema es posible en multimodal.
bajada_en: ByteDance released Lance, an open-source multimodal model with only 3 billion parameters handling image generation, video, and editing. Trained from scratch with limited budget, Lance proves extreme efficiency is possible in multimodal AI.

title: America’s dangerous, messy deepfakes crackdown is here
summary: A law requiring social networks to quickly remove sexual deepfakes and other nonconsensual imagery is now fully in force. But experts warn the policy could do little to help victims - and at worst could facilitate censorship online. Last May, President Donald Trump signed the Take It Down Act, a law addressing nonconsensual intimate imagery […]
title_es: EEUU implementa ley para eliminar deepfakes no consentidos
bajada: La Ley Take It Down Act entró en vigor obligando a redes sociales a remover rápidamente deepfakes sexuales e imágenes íntimas no consentidas. Expertos advierten que la regulación podría tener poco impacto en víctimas y potencialmente facilitar censura online.
bajada_en: The Take It Down Act came into full force, requiring social networks to quickly remove sexual deepfakes and nonconsensual intimate imagery. Experts warn the regulation could have limited impact on victims and potentially facilitate online censorship.

title: The Scaling Laws of Skills in LLM Agent Systems
summary:
arXiv:2605.16508v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: As agent systems scale, skills accumulate into large reusable libraries, yet their scaling laws remain poorly understood. Across 15 frontier LLMs, 1,141 real-world skills, and over 3M routing or execution decisions, we identify two coupled laws. Routing law: single-step routing accuracy decays logarithmically with library size ($R^2{>}0.97$ for all models), with errors progressing from local skill competition to cross-family drift and capture by overly general "black-hole skills". Execution law: before state realization, joint routing is approximately multiplicative, whereas correct execution can improve difficult downstream decisions by about $4{\times}$. A single parameter, the routing logarithmic decay slope $b$, couples the two laws: routing-side fits predict execution-side rescue across models, showing that the same library property controls both pre-execution collapse and downstream recoverability. The laws are actionable: law-guided optimization raises held-out routing accuracy from 71.3% to 91.7%, reduces hijack from 22.4% to 4.1%, and transfers directionally to downstream ClawBench and ClawMark execution settings, improving mean pass rate from 49.3% to 61.6% on ClawBench and from 28.4% to 34.5% on ClawMark. These results show that agent performance depends not only on model capability, but also on the structure, granularity, and exposure policy of the skill library.
title_es: Estudio revela leyes de escalado en sistemas agentes con LLMs
bajada: Un paper en arXiv analiza cómo escalan los sistemas multi-agente con 15 LLMs fronteras y 1,141 skills reales, identificando leyes de enrutamiento y ejecución acopladas. Los hallazgos muestran que la precisión de enrutamiento decae logarítmicamente y proponen optimizaciones para mejorar desempeño de agentes.
bajada_en: An arXiv paper analyzes how multi-agent systems scale with 15 frontier LLMs and 1,141 real skills, identifying coupled routing and execution laws. Findings show routing accuracy decays logarithmically and propose optimizations to improve agent performance.

title: SDOF: Taming the Alignment Tax in Multi-Agent Orchestration with State-Constrained Dispatch
summary:
arXiv:2605.15204v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, and CrewAI route tasks through graph-based pipelines but do not enforce the stage constraints that govern real business processes. We present SDOF, a framework that treats multi-agent execution as a constrained state machine. SDOF operates through two primary defensive layers, implemented by three components: (1) an Online-RLHF Specialized Intent Router trained via Generative Reward Modeling (GRPO) and (2) a StateAwareDispatcher with GoalStage finite-automaton checks and precondition/postcondition SkillRegistry validation for auditable execution control. On a recruitment system backed by the Beisen iTalent platform (6000+ enterprises), 185 expert-curated scenarios trigger 1671 live API calls. Our GSPO-aligned 7B Intent Router achieves higher joint accuracy than zero-shot GPT-4o on this FSM-constrained adversarial routing benchmark (80.9% versus 48.9%). In end-to-end execution, SDOF reaches 86.5% task completion (95% confidence interval 80.8 to 90.7) and blocks all 22 operations in the injection, illegal HR subset. Under a broader message-level blocking audit, SDOF attains precision 100% and recall 88%, expert agreement kappa=0.94. A separate evaluation on 960 SGD-derived dialogues spanning 8 service domains surfaces 201 stage-order conflicts under our FSM mapping, 41 of which arise in the normal split. This arXiv version reports the current validated scope; extended multi-seed training comparisons and deeper workflow evaluations will be released in a subsequent update.
title_es: SDOF: framework para orquestar agentes con restricciones
bajada: Investigadores presentaron SDOF, un framework que trata la ejecución multi-agente como máquinas de estados con restricciones. En pruebas con 6,000+ empresas, SDOF alcanzó 86.5% de completitud de tareas bloqueando operaciones maliciosas, superando a GPT-4o en enrutamiento especializado.
bajada_en: Researchers presented SDOF, a framework treating multi-agent execution as constrained state machines. In tests with 6,000+ enterprises, SDOF achieved 86.5% task completion while blocking malicious operations, outperforming GPT-4o in specialized routing.

title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
title_es: Hugging Face presenta familia Ettin de rerankers
bajada: Hugging Face lanzó Ettin, una nueva familia de modelos de reranking que mejoran la precisión en búsquedas y recuperación de información. Estos modelos son útiles para aplicaciones RAG y sistemas de búsqueda en produción.
bajada_en: Hugging Face launched Ettin, a new family of reranking models that improve precision in search and information retrieval. These models are useful for RAG applications and production search systems.

title: Fine-Tuning NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 with LoRA/DoRA for Robot Video Generation
title_es: Fine-tuning de NVIDIA Cosmos para generación de video robótico
bajada: Hugging Face publicó guías para optimizar NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 con LoRA/DoRA aplicado a generación de video para robots. Este avance facilita que investigadores adapten modelos de video a tareas robóticas específicas.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published guides for fine-tuning NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 with LoRA/DoRA for robot video generation. This advancement makes it easier for researchers to adapt video models for specific robotic tasks.

title: Former OpenAI Staffers Warn xAI's Poor Safety Record Could Complicate SpaceX’s IPO
summary: The ex-employees, who cofounded a new AI watchdog group, say investors deserve more information about xAI’s safety practices before SpaceX goes public.
title_es: Ex-empleados de OpenAI advierten sobre riesgos de xAI en IPO
bajada: Antiguos empleados de OpenAI fundaron un grupo de vigilancia y advirtieron que xAI tiene un pobre historial de seguridad que podría complicar el IPO de SpaceX. Los ex-colegas urgen a inversores a exigir mayor transparencia sobre prácticas de safety antes de la salida a bolsa.
bajada_en: Former OpenAI employees founded a watchdog group and warned that xAI has a poor safety record that could complicate SpaceX's IPO. Ex-colleagues urge investors to demand greater transparency on safety practices before the public offering.

title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
title_es: PaddleOCR 3.5 integra Transformers para OCR mejorado
bajada: PaddleOCR lanzó su versión 3.5 con soporte para backend de Transformers, mejorando OCR y tareas de parsing de documentos. La actualización permite que desarrolladores usen modelos de Transformers para reconocimiento óptico más preciso.
bajada_en: PaddleOCR released version 3.5 with Transformers backend support, improving OCR and document parsing tasks. The update enables developers to use Transformers models for more accurate optical recognition.

title: I/O 2026
summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
title_es: Google I/O 2026: La era de los agentes agentic Gemini
bajada: En Google I/O 2026, la empresa anunció la transición hacia una era de agentes agentic con Gemini. Esto incluye múltiples productos y herramientas diseñadas para automatizar tareas y mejorar la productividad de desarrolladores.
bajada_en: At Google I/O 2026, the company announced the shift toward an agentic agent era with Gemini. This includes multiple products and tools designed to automate tasks and enhance developer productivity.

title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm.At its annualI/O developer conference, Google announced asweeping redesignof the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The company is also merging itsAI OverviewsandAI Modefeatures into a single, seamless search flow, eliminating the friction that previously forced users to choose between a traditional results page and an AI-forward experience.Liz Reid, Google's vice president and head of Search, called it "the biggest upgrade to our iconic search box since its debut over 25 years ago" during a press briefing on Monday.The announcement arrived alongside a blizzard of other news — newGemini models, a personalAI agent called Spark, an intelligentshopping cart, areimagined developer platform— but the search box redesign may prove to be the most consequential. It is the clearest signal yet that Google views the future of its flagship product not as a place where users type fragmented keywords, but as an interface where they hold open-ended, multimodal conversations with an AI system backed by the entire web.The new search box expands, accepts files, and coaches you on what to askThe changes show a fundamental shift in how Google expects people to interact with the product that generates the vast majority of Alphabet's revenue.The box itself now dynamically expands to accommodate longer, more conversational queries. Where the old interface subtly encouraged brevity — a narrow field suited to two- or three-word keyword strings — the new design invites users to fully articulate complex questions in granular det
title_es: Google rediseña su buscador por primera vez en 25 años
bajada: Google revolucionó su icónico cuadro de búsqueda para aceptar texto, imágenes, PDFs, videos y pestañas. El rediseño integra IA Overviews y fusiona la búsqueda tradicional con experiencias impulsadas por IA en un flujo unificado.
bajada_en: Google revolutionized its iconic search box to accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and tabs. The redesign integrates AI Overviews and merges traditional search with AI-driven experiences in a unified flow.

title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
summary: Gemini 3.5 text and multi-colored star icon on an abstract blue background.

bajada: Google presentó Gemini 3.5, su nuevo modelo fronterizo con capacidades mejoradas para ejecutar acciones. El lanzamiento marca un paso significativo en la evolución de los modelos multimodales de la empresa.
bajada_en: Google unveiled Gemini 3.5, its new frontier model with enhanced action capabilities. The release marks a significant step forward in the evolution of the company's multimodal models.

title: Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026: Gemini, Search, Smart Glasses
summary: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. There are also some spiffy new smart glasses coming this fall.
title_es: Google I/O 2026: Resumen de anuncios principales
bajada: Google presentó múltiples innovaciones en I/O 2026 incluyendo nuevos modelos Gemini, rediseño de búsqueda y gafas inteligentes. El evento consolidó la estrategia de la empresa hacia una experiencia más integrada con IA.
bajada_en: Google unveiled multiple innovations at I/O 2026 including new Gemini models, search redesign, and smart glasses. The event solidified the company's strategy toward a more AI-integrated experience.

title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era

bajada_en: Google presented its vision for the future of AI at the I/O 2026 conference. The event highlighted how the company is integrating AI across its products to make it more useful for users.

title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of models

bajada: Hugging Face y Allen AI lanzaron OlmoEarth v1.1, una familia de modelos más eficientes. La actualización mejora el rendimiento manteniendo menores requisitos computacionales, beneficiando a desarrolladores con recursos limitados.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Allen AI released OlmoEarth v1.1, a more efficient family of models. The update improves performance while maintaining lower computational requirements, benefiting developers with limited resources.

title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
title_es: OpenAI avanza en autenticación de contenido con Content Credentials
bajada: OpenAI implementó Content Credentials y herramientas de verificación para combatir desinformación. La iniciativa busca ayudar a usuarios a identificar y confiar en contenido generado por IA de manera segura.
bajada_en: OpenAI deployed Content Credentials and verification tools to combat misinformation. The initiative aims to help users identify and trust AI-generated content safely.

title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026
summary: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.
title_es: Gmail integra búsqueda conversacional con voz en Gemini
bajada: Google expandió Gmail con búsqueda conversacional por voz usando Gemini. Los usuarios ahora pueden hacer preguntas naturales para encontrar información enterrada en su bandeja de entrada.
bajada_en: Google expanded Gmail with conversational voice search using Gemini. Users can now ask natural language questions to find buried information in their inbox.

title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches
summary: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.
title_es: Google lanza agentes de IA para búsquedas más inteligentes
bajada: Google presentó agentes de IA que monitorizan tópicos y alertan proactivamente a usuarios. Estos agentes van más allá de búsquedas tradicionales para ofrecer actualizaciones automáticas de temas de interés.
bajada_en: Google launched AI agents that monitor topics and proactively alert users to updates. These agents go beyond traditional searches to deliver automatic updates on topics of interest.

title: Gemini will use Volvo’s external cameras to interpret parking signs
summary: Gemini is gaining the power of sight and mobility. Today at the I/O conference, Google and Volvo announced that the AI-powered assistant will be able to access external cameras in the upcoming EX60 SUV to help explain and interpret its surroundings to vehicle owners. The upgrade is possible thanks to Volvo's use of Google's embedded […]
title_es: Gemini interpreta señales de estacionamiento en autos Volvo
bajada: Google y Volvo integraron Gemini en el SUV EX60 para interpretar señales de estacionamiento. El modelo ahora puede acceder a cámaras externas del vehículo para explicar su entorno a los conductores.
bajada_en: Google and Volvo integrated Gemini into the EX60 SUV to interpret parking signs. The model can now access external vehicle cameras to explain its surroundings to drivers.

title: NVIDIA and Google Cloud Empower the Next Wave of AI Builders
summary: At this year’s Google I/O conference, NVIDIA and Google Cloud are accelerating the work of more than 100,000 developers in the companies’ joint developer community, which provides curated learning paths, hands-on labs and events that help them build using the full-stack NVIDIA AI platform on Google Cloud.  Launched at Google I/O last year, the community […]

bajada: NVIDIA y Google Cloud ampliaron su programa conjunto para más de 100,000 desarrolladores. La iniciativa proporciona rutas de aprendizaje curado y laboratorios prácticos para construir con la plataforma NVIDIA en Google Cloud.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Google Cloud expanded their joint program for over 100,000 developers. The initiative provides curated learning paths and hands-on labs to build with NVIDIA platform on Google Cloud.

title: Google Makes It Easy to Deepfake Yourself
summary: Google’s overhaul of its AI creation software, Flow, includes a new video model and a tool for generating selfie videos called avatars.
title_es: Google actualiza Flow: Herramienta para generar videos avatares
bajada: Google rediseñó su software de creación de IA Flow con nuevo modelo de video y generador de avatares. La herramienta permite crear videos selfie de forma sencilla, aunque plantea preocupaciones sobre deepfakes.
bajada_en: Google redesigned its AI creation software Flow with a new video model and avatar generator. The tool enables easy selfie video creation, though it raises concerns about deepfakes.

title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing

bajada: Ocean, una plataforma de seguridad de email agentic, recaudó $28 millones de Lightspeed Venture Partners. La startup aborda el creciente problema del phishing impulsado por IA.
bajada_en: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, raised $28 million from Lightspeed Venture Partners. The startup addresses the growing problem of AI-driven phishing.

title: Google’s AI future demands trust — and your personal data
summary: Google has big promises for its AI-powered future - and a lot of it depends on your trust. At I/O 2026, Google described a bunch of new tools that it claims will make your life easier. Gemini Spark, Google's always-on AI agent, can help organize an upcoming event, while Daily Brief can offer a rundown […]
title_es: Google I/O 2026: IA requiere confianza y datos personales
bajada: Google presentó su visión de IA en I/O 2026, destacando herramientas como Gemini Spark y Daily Brief que requieren acceso a datos personales. El enfoque plantea preguntas sobre privacidad en la era agentic.
bajada_en: Google presented its AI vision at I/O 2026, highlighting tools like Gemini Spark and Daily Brief that require personal data access. The approach raises privacy questions in the agentic era.
